news.title: OTLK Stock Surges On FDA Lytenava Application Resubmission After Successful Appeal
Outlook Therapeutics Resubmits Lytenava Biologics License Application to FDA
Outlook Therapeutics Announces Resubmission of Biologics License Application to U.S. FDA for ONS-5010/LYTENAVA™ (bevacizumab-vikg)
